hooks.name: Voice Notification
hooks.description: Speaks completion message using macOS TTS

hooks.name: macOS Notification
hooks.description: Shows a macOS notification when task completes
hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Task completed" with title "8gent Code"'

hooks.name: Timing Logger
hooks.functionBody: console.log(`[TIMING] ${context.tool}: ${context.duration}ms`); return { tool: context.tool, duration: context.duration };

hooks.name: Auto Git Add
hooks.description: Automatically stages file changes after write_file
hooks.functionBody: if (context.tool === 'write_file' && context.toolInput?.path) { require('child_process').execSync(`git add "${context.toolInput.path}"`, { cwd: context.workingDirectory }); return 'staged'; } return null;
